fields.label: Organization
fields.description: Tenant floor (ADR §3). Denormalized from the branch.

fields.label: Branch
fields.description: Scoping key (FLO-5 contract). Branch-bound to the gathering's branch.

fields.label: Group
fields.description: Originating group axis (group-scope hook surface, ADR §6.3). Branch-bound to the gathering's group.

fields.label: Gathering
fields.description: The one-time event this invitation is for (registration_scope = Invited Only, FLO-7 §3.6).

fields.label: Invitee
fields.description: The invited person (visitors are Flock Member rows with status=Visitor, login-less; FLO-5 §3.2).

fields.label: Invitee Group
fields.description: Invite a whole group subtree at once (§3.6). When set, every active member of this group's subtree is eligible under the invitation — used by the bulk-create path.

fields.label: Invitee Name
fields.description: Denormalized invitee full_name for list search.

fields.label: Invite Token
fields.description: Opaque token for link-based RSVP (login-less visitors can accept/decline without a session, §3.6). Generated on create.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Invitation lifecycle (§3.6). Sent on create; Accepted/Declined on RSVP; Expired past expires_on.

fields.label: Expires On
fields.description: When the invitation lapses (an expired invitation is out of scope, §5 Invited Only). Null = no expiry.

fields.label: Accepted Registration
fields.description: The registration row created when the invitee RSVPs Accepted (back-reference, §3.6). Null until accepted.
